pkgmetadata.longdescription:
mise (formerly rtx) is a polyglot dev-tool version manager, task runner, and per-project environment manager.
Forked from guru's dev-util/mise (last-rited 2026-05-18 per https://bugs.gentoo.org/974977). The Cargo dependency graph is vendored offline via files/make-vendor.sh rather than enumerated via cargo eclass CRATES= (~600 crates, impractical to maintain by hand).
Helper files (mise.sh, mise.fish, config.toml) are kept from the guru ebuild so shell auto-activation and paranoid mode survive the move.
